page.title: Tenants
page.subtitle: Super admin: create tenants, edit metadata, and impersonate for support.
page.listHelp: Each tenant has its own products, registers, and receipts.

licensesPage.subtitle: Super admin: filter, export, and manage license status across all tenants.
licensesPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by tenant, subdomain, email, or license key
licensesPage.noRowsToExport: There are no filtered tenants to export.

extendModal.title: Extend license - {{name}}
extendModal.licenseKeyTooltip: If left empty, only the date will be updated
extendModal.hintDescription: After the extension, the tenant will be able to work normally again.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: Only super administrators may open this page.

fields.name: Tenant name
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphen only — e.g. cafe-example (not cafe-example.regkasse.at).
fields.slugPreviewEmpty: Enter a valid slug to preview the URL.

validation.contactEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

slug.required: Please enter a subdomain slug (e.g. cafe-example).
slug.invalid: Use a–z, 0–9 and hyphen only; do not paste the full host (e.g. test.regkasse.at).
slug.reserved: This slug is reserved (e.g. admin, www).
slug.availabilityFailed: Could not check availability. Please try again.

errors.title: Error creating customer
errors.adminEmailTaken: This email address is already used by another user.

create.title: Add new customer (tenant)
create.subtitle: Technical setup (register, demo data, administrator) runs automatically.

processing.title: Creating customer …
processing.subtitle: Please wait until setup is complete.
processing.subtitleError: Setup was cancelled. No data was saved.
processing.rollbackHint: If a step fails, changes are rolled back automatically.

name.label: Company name
name.tooltip: How the customer appears on receipts and in admin

errors.tooShort: Company name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.tooLong: Company name must be at most 200 characters.

slug.label: Subdomain / address
slug.tooltip: Web address for the customer's register and admin
slug.hint: Suggested automatically from the company name

errors.pattern: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens are allowed
errors.invalid: Only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens; do not paste the full domain.
errors.reserved: This subdomain is reserved (e.g. admin, www).
errors.availabilityFailed: Could not check availability. Please try again.

contactEmail.label: Email (contact)
contactEmail.tooltip: Also used as the administrator sign-in email
contactEmail.hint: For invoices, support, and administrator sign-in

errors.required: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

phone.label: Phone
phone.hint: 📞 For support only — never used for marketing.

errors.invalid: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +43 123 456789).

errors.tooLong: Address must be at most 500 characters.

adminEmail.label: Admin access (created automatically)
adminEmail.tooltip: Use these credentials to sign in
adminEmail.hint: 🔐 The password is shown ONCE after creation.

grantTrialLicense.label: Enable 30-day demo license (free)
grantTrialLicense.tooltip: 30 days free trial, renewal available afterwards

autoDemoSetup.label: Create demo products and register automatically
autoDemoSetup.tooltip: Creates main register and three demo products (recommended)

importDemoProducts.label: Import demo products automatically
importDemoProducts.tooltip: Imports the full demo menu (salads, pizzas, pasta, kebab, …) instead of only three sample products

provisioning.title: Tenant “{{name}}” provisioned
provisioning.demoMenuImported: Demo menu imported: {{count}} products across demo categories.
provisioning.missingWarning: Automatic setup could not be confirmed. Please verify the tenant or contact support.
provisioning.passwordWarning: This password is shown only NOW, once!
provisioning.emailSent: An email with the credentials was sent to {{email}}.
provisioning.emailNotSent: SMTP is not configured or delivery failed. Please share the credentials manually with {{email}}.
provisioning.forcePasswordChange: The customer must change the password on first sign-in.

confirmSuspend.title: Suspend tenant?
confirmSuspend.body: Users cannot sign in until the tenant is reactivated.

registers.hint: Create registers after impersonating the tenant (Settings → Registers).

license.extendHint: Use a REGK key from Licenses or set an end date manually.
license.issuedHint: Manage issued license keys under Licenses (may require impersonation for tenant-scoped activation).
license.consistencyOk: Mandant and deployment license are aligned.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.hint: Permanent delete only for soft-deleted tenants without fiscal receipts. Cannot be undone.
danger.confirmBody: All non-fiscal data for this tenant will be removed.

danger.decommissionWizardHint: The wizard decommissions all related registers first and archives the tenant safely afterwards.
danger.softDeleteHint: If you delete this tenant, users cannot sign in. Data is kept and can be restored.
danger.softDeleteNoAccess: Users will lose access to this tenant.
danger.softDeleteRecoverable: Data is retained; you can restore the tenant at any time.
danger.developmentHardDeleteHint: Available in development only. This path archives and permanently deletes the tenant immediately.
danger.deletedWarning: This tenant is deleted. Restore it or remove it permanently (cannot be undone).
danger.deletedSettingsHint: Delete, restore, and permanent removal are under Settings → Danger zone.
danger.restoreModalBody: After restore, users with active membership can access the tenant again.
danger.hardDeleteDataLoss: All unprotected data for “{{name}}” will be permanently deleted.
danger.hardDeleteAck: I understand this action cannot be undone.
danger.auditLink: View operations for this tenant in audit logs →

decommission.criticalBody: The wizard permanently decommissions all related registers and then archives the tenant from the active system.
decommission.alreadyArchivedBody: This tenant has already been soft-deleted. Running the archive step again is not necessary.

preflight.manualConfirm: I have reviewed and confirmed this item.

noOpenPayments.label: No open payments
noOpenPayments.description: This item is deliberately confirmed manually so unresolved transactions are not missed.

dailyClosingDone.label: Daily closing completed
dailyClosingDone.description: The last operational daily closing should be completed before tenant decommissioning.

registersPrepared.label: All registers are prepared for decommissioning
registersPrepared.readyDescription: All remaining registers are closed or already decommissioned.
registersPrepared.openDescription: {{count}} open register(s) must be closed first.
registersPrepared.blockedDescription: Registers in maintenance or disabled status must be reviewed before decommissioning.

fiscalExport.label: Fiscal export recommended
fiscalExport.description: Before archiving, generate or verify a current export for audit and compliance purposes.

registers.title: Decommission registers
registers.description: All registers for this tenant will be decommissioned. A closing receipt is created automatically.
registers.loadFailed: Could not load registers for this tenant.
registers.permissionDenied: Your account cannot decommission registers. Ask an authorized super admin to perform this step.
registers.blockedBody: Open, disabled, or maintenance registers must be brought into a decommissionable state first.
registers.readyForArchive: All registers are already decommissioned. You can continue with tenant archiving.
registers.reasonPlaceholder: Reason for decommissioning all remaining registers

export.title: Fiscal export
export.description: Before decommissioning, a complete export of tax-relevant data is recommended. This export must be retained for 7 years.
export.retentionBody: The data must be retained for 7 years. Download the export and store it securely.
export.permissionBody: Your account currently lacks the report.export permission required for this export.

archive.warningBody: The tenant is removed from the active system, but the data remains retained. During that time, the tenant can be restored.
archive.confirmLabel: Type the tenant name “{{name}}” to confirm.

result.title: Tenant archived successfully
result.subtitle: {{name}} was removed from the active system.
result.registersDecommissioned: {{count}} register(s) were decommissioned during this run.

nextSteps.restoreWindow: The tenant remains restorable via soft-delete until a separate hard-delete is performed.
nextSteps.hardDelete: Permanent deletion remains a separate manual step in the danger zone.
nextSteps.fiscalExportRetention: Store the fiscal export and other tax-relevant records securely according to your retention obligations.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this tenant?
confirmDelete.body: The tenant will be marked deleted and can be restored later. Users will lose access to this tenant.

confirmRestore.title: Restore tenant?
confirmRestore.body: Status will be set to active and memberships reactivated.

confirmHardDelete.title: Permanently delete tenant
confirmHardDelete.dataLoss: All unprotected data for “{{name}}” will be permanently removed.

impersonationRedirect.title: Redirecting to tenant …
impersonationRedirect.hint: Signing in on the tenant domain. Please wait.

page.title: Tenant users
page.subtitle: Assign existing users to this tenant, set the tenant owner (primary admin), and manage roles.

users.empty: No users assigned yet. Add an existing user or provision an admin when creating a tenant.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.body: Generate a new one-time password for {{name}} ({{email}})?
resetPassword.smtpOff: SMTP is not configured — password is shown here only.
resetPassword.forceChangeHint: The user must sign in with this password and change it on first login.

superAdminOnly.credentialsHint: Creating tenant users with a one-time password and viewing credentials is restricted to the Super Admin role.

create.hint: After creation a password is generated automatically and shown once. Share it with the user.
create.passwordAutoHint: The password is shown in the success dialog after creation (once only).
create.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
create.passwordOnceWarning: This password is shown only once!
create.nextStep1: Share the password securely with the user
create.nextStep2: The user signs in for the first time at {{portalUrl}}
create.nextStep2NoUrl: The user signs in for the first time at the tenant portal
create.nextStep3: They must change the password on first login

invite.title: Add user
invite.subtitle: Enter email and role. New accounts receive a one-time password shown here.
invite.createHint: After creation a password is generated and shown once. Share it with the user.
invite.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
invite.smtpHint: Without API SMTP configuration, the one-time password is shown here.
invite.resultCreated: A new user account was created and assigned to this tenant.
invite.resultExisting: An existing user was assigned to this tenant.
invite.passwordOnceWarning: This password is shown only once!
invite.nextStep1: Share the password securely with the user
invite.nextStep2: The user signs in for the first time at {{portalUrl}}
invite.nextStep2NoUrl: The user signs in for the first time at the tenant portal
invite.nextStep3: They must change the password on first login

messages.assignedExisting: User was assigned to the tenant.
messages.assignedNoEmail: User assigned; email could not be sent.

quick.title: Generate quick user
quick.assignmentRequiredAfterCreate: After creation, you must assign the user to a tenant.
quick.autoForceChange: User must change password on first login

result.title: User generated
result.passwordOnceWarning: This password is shown only once!
result.nextStep1: Share the password securely with the user
result.nextStep2: User must change password on first login

messages.rateLimited: Rate limit reached: at most 10 quick users per hour per tenant.

add.title: Add user to tenant
add.ownerHint: At most one active owner per tenant. The owner is the primary admin for login and support.

confirmRemove.title: Remove assignment?
confirmRemove.body: The user loses active tenant membership (login mapping).

errors.missing_token: No sign-in token was found in the redirect.
errors.missing_tenant: No tenant was specified in the redirect.
errors.tenant_mismatch: Tenant does not match this subdomain.
errors.not_impersonation: Token is not an impersonation token.
errors.expired: Impersonation token has expired. Start again from admin.regkasse.at.
